title: Retry deployment

requirements.text: Redeploy the current application to the Internet Computer network without any code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: The application deploys successfully to the Internet Computer network.
All existing frontend and backend functionality remains intact after redeployment.

constraints: Do not modify any existing code — this is a pure redeployment retry.
nonGoals: No new features or bug fixes in this request.
No changes to backend data models or frontend components.
